appDesc.message: Put sticky notes on any webpage. Content and position are saved automatically, with per-site or global visibility.

popupUnavailable.message: Notes aren't available on this page (browser-internal pages, the Web Store, etc.). Please open a regular webpage.

optionsScopeSiteDesc.message: This site only — visible only on the site where the note was created

optionsScopeGlobalDesc.message: All sites — always visible on every page

optionsPrivacyNote.message: All notes are stored only in this browser's local storage (chrome.storage.local) and are never sent to any external server.
